headline: Sol Rashidi, World’s First Chief AI Officer, Joins Agenda at FICO World 2026
summary: BOZEMAN, Mont., March 26, 2026--Global analytics software leader FICO (NYSE:FICO) today announced that Sol Rashidi, the world’s 1st Chief AI Officer for Enterprise (2016) and a 2026 LinkedIn Top Voice, will deliver a keynote address at FICO® World 2026. Rashidi is a senior fellow at Harvard and a former AWS and Fortune 100 C-Suite exec who helped IBM launch Watson in 2011. Rashidi joins a rich agenda on decision intelligence technology, fraud detection and risk management at the conference, whic
